title: Theme: Health and Medicine
description: Vocabulary for doctor visits, symptoms, and pharmacy.

sentences.spanish: Tengo una cita con el doctor a las tres de la tarde.
sentences.english: I have an appointment with the doctor at three in the afternoon.

sentences.spanish: Me duele la cabeza y tengo fiebre alta.
sentences.english: My head hurts and I have a high fever.

sentences.spanish: Necesito comprar jarabe para la tos en la farmacia.
sentences.english: I need to buy cough syrup at the pharmacy.

sentences.spanish: El médico me recetó antibióticos para la infección.
sentences.english: The doctor prescribed antibiotics for the infection.

sentences.spanish: Es importante descansar y beber mucha agua.
sentences.english: It is important to rest and drink plenty of water.

sentences.spanish: Me torcí el tobillo jugando al fútbol ayer.
sentences.english: I twisted my ankle playing soccer yesterday.
Are you allergic to any medication?

sentences.spanish: La enfermera le tomará la presión arterial ahora.
sentences.english: The nurse will take your blood pressure now.

sentences.spanish: Siento náuseas y mareos desde esta mañana.
sentences.english: I feel nausea and dizziness since this morning.
Take good care of yourself and get better soon.
